ddls:
CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* File identifier associated with the configuration */,
  "implicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dependency is implicit */,
  "reference" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reference is used */,
  "compiled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the configuration was compiled successfully */,
  "compiled_pch" INTEGER /* Indicates if precompiled headers were used */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dependency is explicit */,
  "shared" INTEGER /* Indicates if libraries are shared */,
  "generated" INTEGER /* Indicates if files were generated */,
  "config_final" INTEGER /* Indicates if the configuration is final */,
  "include_path" INTEGER /* Path for include files */,
  "framework_include_path" INTEGER /* Path for framework include files */,
  "options" INTEGER /* Additional options for the configuration */,
  "config_version" TEXT /* Version of the configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the configuration */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was last modified */,
  "build_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the build was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the configuration file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the configuration file in MB */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., .txt, .json, .xml) */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "uploaded_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_uploaded_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration this dependency belongs to */,
  "dependency_name" TEXT /* Name of the dependency */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dependency is shared */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dependency */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dependency (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the dependency was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration associated with this log */,
  "build_status" TEXT /* Status of the build (e.g., Success, Failure) */,
  "build_date" TEXT /* Date when the build was performed */,
  "message" TEXT /* Log message providing details about the build process */,
  "build_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the build process in seconds */,
  "build_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the build was performed */,
  "built_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who performed the build */,
  "built_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who performed the build */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_logs_built_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("built_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with this permission */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration this permission applies to */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can edit the configuration */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can view the configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the permission */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration associated with this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shared_libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shared library */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the shared library */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the shared library */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the shared library */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the shared library was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the shared library */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the shared library was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shared_libraries_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shared_libraries_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
